title: stylocoryna elliptica
intro: Stylocoryna elliptica, also known as the elliptical Stylocoryna, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain alkaloids and glycosides in its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Stylocoryna elliptica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Stylocoryna elliptica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in some folk medicines as a topical application for wound healing and skin conditions.
